About Me

The Vision behind the Lens

Great visuals don't happen by chance—they're designed. I combine cinematography, editing, and visual storytelling to craft films that capture attention, communicate purpose, and leave a lasting impression for brands and businesses.

Studied at IIT Hyderabad. Available for editorial, commercial, and personal projects (patna) — near and far.
